name: veracity-audit
description: Audit a data pipeline for Veracity and Value. Dispatches data-scientist, compliance-auditor, and data-engineer agents with project context injected at dispatch time. All source paths are supplied via flags — no defaults, no project assumptions. Subcommands: audit (full pipeline walk), score-check (scoring math only), gate-check (gate coverage only), source-trace <label> (single source end-to-end). Invoke when: "audit pipeline", "veracity check", "scoring math correct?", "check gates", "trace source", "verify quality gates", "formula correct?".
